title: Lead Instructional Designer at S.Chand Group

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at S.Chand Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About S.Chand Group:
S.Chand Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group!
